service_offerings.name: Heating & cooling
service_offerings.scope: Furnace repair, AC install and tune-up, heat pumps, ductless mini-splits, boilers, indoor air quality

service_offerings.name: Plumbing
service_offerings.scope: Drain cleaning, water heaters, leak detection, repipes, gas-line work, sewer service

service_offerings.scope: Panel upgrades, generator install and service, EV charger install, whole-home rewires, code corrections

service_offerings.name: Excavation
service_offerings.scope: Sewer / water-line excavation, trenching, French drains, line replacement

service_offerings.name: Indoor air quality
service_offerings.scope: Whole-home filtration, humidifiers / dehumidifiers, UV purification, duct cleaning

unique_differentiators: Family-owned and operated since 1921 — over 100 years serving Western and Central New York
24/7 emergency service across HVAC, plumbing, and electrical
Single provider for HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and excavation
required_positioning_phrases: Western New York's trusted home-services partner since 1921
Reimer is a Factory Authorized Trane Dealer

banned_claims.reason: FTC Section 5 / 16 CFR 233: comparative price guarantees require disclosed basis and method
NYS DOS HVAC contractor consumer-protection rules: bait-and-switch concerns when 'free' is paired with diagnostic fees

banned_claims.claim: 100% guaranteed satisfaction or your money back
banned_claims.reason: Money-back guarantees on installed services require explicit refund terms; risk of FTC deceptive-acts claim without published policy

tone_guidelines.voice: warm, neighborly, plainspoken; emphasizes trust and longevity
tone_guidelines.register: professional but approachable — your neighbor who happens to fix furnaces

target_audience.firmographic: Single-family homeowners 30-70 in WNY/CNY needing HVAC, plumbing, or electrical service
target_audience.persona: Worried homeowner whose furnace just stopped on a January night; values speed, reliability, and family-business roots over flashy marketing
